senses.gloss: bat, racket (club used for striking the ball in sports)

examples.text: مَثَلاً، عِنْدَنَا فِي كَالِيفُورْنِيَا لَوْ كَانَ دُكَّان يَبِيع مَضَارِب التِّنِس، فَإِنَّ جَارَهُ لَنْ يَبِيع مَضَارِب التِّنِس أَيْضًا.
examples.english: For example, in California, if it were a shop selling tennis rackets, its neighbour would not sell tennis rackets either.

etymology.text: Morphologically from the root ض ر ب (ḍ r b).
